item.title: And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, â€œIâ€™l...
item.description:
View on Instagram


And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, â€œIâ€™ll have to do it myself!â€‌ ًں¤¯I honestly have to keep pinching myself and even then Iâ€™m still having trouble fathoming the sheer size of the project I achieved. ًںڈ†I know this is only the beginning and thereâ€™s a long way to go but the amount of skills and knowledge I picked in just 8 weeks of completing my house foundations has opened up a whole new door for me ًںڑھAnd Iâ€™m so excited to continue opening doors as this journey unfolds and watch the evolution over time, this is the beginning of something magical I can feel it âœ¨ًںŒ»#housefootings #foundations #ownerbuilder #howhardcanitbe #illdoitmyself #containerhouse

item.title: ًں› ï¸ڈًںڈ How I started my container home build journey ًںڈ ًں›...
item.description:
View on Instagram


ًں› ï¸ڈًںڈ How I started my container home build journey ًںڈ ًں› ï¸ڈThe vision wasnâ€™t always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.ًں’ھLife is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. ًں§چI believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we donâ€™t see reality as it is, we see it as we are ًں‘€This is your life, your reality and the key word here is â€کyouâ€™! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? âœ¨ًں«¶#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream

item.title: Itâ€™s been 6 weeks now sinceâ€¦I decided to do my own house fou...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Itâ€™s been 6 weeks now sinceâ€¦I decided to do my own house foundations ًںڈ As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. âڑ’ï¸ڈHowever with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. ًں¤·â€چâ™€ï¸ڈBut wow itâ€™s been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming âŒ›ï¸ڈThis is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasnâ€™t until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more â€کdo-ableâ€™ ًںڑœThe majority of the six weeks that Iâ€™ve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. ًں™‹ Whatâ€™s your opinion? â¬‡ï¸ڈDo you think itâ€™s worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though itâ€™s taking 2-3x the amount of time? ًں¤·â€چâ™€ï¸ڈ#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy

item.title: Even after all the challenges Iâ€™ve faced on this build I still...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Even after all the challenges Iâ€™ve faced on this build I still head into the build every day with a â€œhow hard could it be attitudeâ€‌ ًںک‚Some days Iâ€™m spot on the money and others itâ€™s 10x harder than I could have ever imagined but without fail after the end of every back breaking day the next morning I wake up and Iâ€™ve somehow reset back to my same â€کhow hard can it beâ€™ outlook.Iâ€™m not sure what type of wizardry this is, Iâ€™m just grateful ًںک‌âœ¨

item.title: Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now thereâ€™s rarely a day when Iâ€™m not welding something ًں‘©â€چًںڈ­Did I pick up the skill straight away? No. Was I a natural? No Did I work my ass off at it and weld for hours a day until I was pretty dam good, F*** YES I did! We arenâ€™t disappointed when a child doesnâ€™t come out of the womb running and we donâ€™t judge how smart a fish is on its ability to climb a tree.Letâ€™s give ourselves the same courtesy and not let the fear of not being able to do something keep us from doing anything at all ًںچƒ

Now that the last roof sheet is up I can start to move onto the final important components of the roof like fasciaâ€™s, gutters and trim! ًںک‌Iâ€™ll be installing a lot of timber on the underneath of the roof for the final touch but that will be done towards the end of the build ًںڈ

Hands up if youâ€™ve been waiting for this one for a while ًں™‹â€چâ™€ï¸ڈI know I have! ًںک‌I got my last roof sheet a couple months ago (and two spare because Iâ€™ve learnt from my past mistakes ًںک‚) but I had no way of actually getting off the roof when I had the last roof sheet installed.But I finally bought scaffolding which meant a safe passage to the ground! âکپï¸ڈ
